     the Fermi energy is     2.3525 ev

!    total energy              =   -8184.65959122 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          4.4E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.28997184 Ry

     one-electron contribution = -282950.85333153 Ry
